name: Swapcard Event Networking and Matchmaking Platform API
what_it_does: Swapcard AI-powered event networking and matchmaking REST API for conference organizers, trade show managers, and association event teams to create and manage networking events with AI-driven attendee matchmaking, business card exchange, meeting scheduling, and exhibitor lead capture — enabling programmatic event creation, attendee profile management, AI meeting recommendations, and engagement analytics through Swapcard's networking-first event platform. Enables AI agents to manage event creation for networking event automation, handle attendee import for participant profile automation, access matchmaking configuration for AI meeting recommendation automation, retrieve connection data for networking analytics automation, manage meeting scheduling for 1:1 appointment automation, handle exhibitor lead for trade show lead capture automation, access session replay for content automation, retrieve engagement score for attendee activity reporting automation, manage app customization for branded event experience automation, and integrate Swapcard with CRM, AMS, and event registration for end-to-end networking event automation.
use_cases: Creating AI-powered networking events with automated attendee matchmaking for conference automation agents
Managing trade show exhibitor lead capture and meeting scheduling for B2B event automation agents
Accessing attendee engagement scores and connection data for event ROI reporting automation agents
Integrating Swapcard with CRM and AMS for association event membership management automation agents
not_for: Simple webinars without networking component (Goldcast or Hubilo are better for pure webinar formats)
Consumer public event ticketing (Swapcard is professional/B2B conference-focused)
Physical event check-in only without networking (Eventbrite handles simpler in-person ticketing)
best_when: A conference organizer, trade show manager, or professional association wanting AI agents to create networking events with AI-powered attendee matchmaking, exhibitor lead capture, and 1:1 meeting scheduling through Swapcard's platform.
avoid_when: ENTERPRISE OR PROFESSIONAL PLAN REQUIRED: Swapcard API access requires Professional or Enterprise plan; automated starter plan API assumption creates no API access; automated must have appropriate subscription tier for API. AI MATCHMAKING IS CONFIGURATION-DEPENDENT: Swapcard's AI networking recommendations depend on complete attendee profile data; automated minimal profile import assumption creates poor matching quality; automated must import rich attendee profiles (interests, job function, goals) for effective AI matching. EXHIBITOR LEADS ARE OPT-IN: Trade show lead capture requires exhibitor and attendee consent configuration; automated universal lead export assumption creates consent violation; automated must configure lead capture consent per exhibitor. GRAPHQL IS PRIMARY INTERFACE: Swapcard's primary API is GraphQL, not REST; automated REST-only assumption creates integration mismatch; automated should implement GraphQL client for Swapcard integration.

auth.notes: Swapcard uses API key authentication with GraphQL API. GraphQL API (not REST). Paris, France HQ. Founded 2013 by Pierre-Henri Deballon. Products: Event app, AI networking, meeting scheduling, lead capture, hybrid streaming, virtual events, data analytics. SDKs: None public. Raised €25M (2021). GDPR compliant. Association, conference, and trade show focus. Competes with Hubilo and Cvent for event networking platform.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Demo available; production requires Professional or Enterprise contract
pricing.paid_tiers: Professional and Enterprise tiers; custom pricing based on events and attendees
pricing.notes: Paris FR. GDPR. GraphQL API. Professional/Enterprise for API. Event networking focus.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; GraphQL query complexity limits; webhooks for event lifecycle

known_agent_gotchas: GRAPHQL NOT REST: Swapcard's primary API is GraphQL, not REST; automated REST client assumption creates wrong integration pattern; automated must implement GraphQL client with query/mutation support for Swapcard

GRAPHQL COMPLEXITY LIMITS: Swapcard enforces GraphQL query complexity limits; automated deeply nested query assumption creates complexity_exceeded error; automated must decompose complex queries into multiple simpler queries

AI MATCHING REQUIRES RICH PROFILES: Swapcard AI matchmaking quality depends on completeness of attendee profile data; automated minimal profile import creates poor match quality; automated must import interests, job function, company, goals fields for effective networking

LEAD CAPTURE CONSENT REQUIRED: Exhibitor lead scanning and export requires explicit attendee consent setup; automated universal lead access assumption creates GDPR consent violation; automated must configure per-exhibitor consent and honor opt-out flags

PROFESSIONAL PLAN MINIMUM FOR API: Swapcard API access requires at minimum Professional plan; automated entry-level subscription API assumption creates unauthorized access; automated must verify plan includes API before development
agent_readiness.security_notes: Event networking platform. GDPR. API key. EU/FR. Attendee networking and contact exchange data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Event networking. GDPR. API key. EU/FR. Attendee contact and networking data.
